gas_overrides.notes: Example gas override block for future replacement by Garfield++-derived calibration.

gain_overrides.notes: Example gain rescaling to demonstrate Level 3 calibrated vs default comparison.

drift_overrides.notes: Example drift block showing how later transport tuning can be stored.

pulse_overrides.notes: Example pulse block reserved for later electronics/scope calibration usage.

metadata.description: Default example surrogate calibration record for Ar/CO2 70/30.
metadata.intended_use: Demonstrate the Level 3 calibrated comparison workflow before Garfield++-derived numbers are available.
metadata.replacement_plan: Replace these fields with gas-, field-, and geometry-dependent calibration products from Garfield++ studies when available.
